revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''7-5-290

Alternative terms: Pinned, Articulated

The description of a structural member which has been secured in such a way as to permit some rotational movement, sufficient to eliminate all bending moment in the member at the joint.

{{IALAFooter}}
